title: E.U. Loan for Ukraine Becomes Election Leverage for Orban
summary_full: European leaders are pushing Prime Minister Viktor Orban to stop blocking a €90 billion loan to Ukraine. But the issue is a rallying cry in remarkably close elections in Hungary set for April 12.
summary_public: European leaders are pushing Prime Minister Viktor Orban to stop blocking a €90 billion loan to Ukraine. But the issue is a rallying cry in remarkably close elections in Hungary set for April 12.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: Orban to stop blocking a €90 billion loan to Ukraine

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: European leaders are pushing Prime Minister Viktor Orban to stop blocking a €90 billion loan to Ukraine
